samples.text: A person is fully asleep and fully awake at the exact same moment. Is this logically consistent?
Someone is completely asleep and completely awake at the same instant. Does this make logical sense?
An individual is entirely asleep and entirely awake at the same time. Is this logically consistent?
Asleep and awake are mutually exclusive states. One cannot be fully both at once. Is the described situation logically consistent?
A person is fully asleep and fully awake at the exact same moment. There are several books on the shelf. Is this logically consistent?
